ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "squareMeters" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square meters */,
  "numberOfRooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the property */,
  "hasYard" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a yard */,
  "hasPool" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a pool */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "cityCode" INTEGER /* Code of the city where the property is located */,
  "cityPartRange" INTEGER /* Range of the city part where the property is located */,
  "numPrevOwners" INTEGER /* Number of previous owners of the property */,
  "made" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "isNewBuilt" INTEGER /* Whether the property is new-built */,
  "hasStormProtector" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a storm protector */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Size of the basement in square meters */,
  "attic" INTEGER /* Size of the attic in square meters */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Size of the garage in square meters */,
  "hasStorageRoom" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a storage room */,
  "hasGuestRoom" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a guest room */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the property (e.g., Basic, Luxury) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the property */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, under contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_cityCode FOREIGN KEY ("cityCode") REFERENCES cities ("city_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_code" INTEGER /* Code of the city */,
  "city_part_range" INTEGER /* Range of the city part */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "average_property_value" REAL /* Average value of properties in the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the city's population or property values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "minimum_price" REAL /* Minimum price for properties in this category */,
  "maximum_price" REAL /* Maximum price for properties in this category */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in this category */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was finalized */,
  "property_status_after_sale" TEXT /* Status of the property after the sale (e.g., sold, under new ownership) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., yard, pool) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., exterior, interior) */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Whether the feature is customizable */,
  "maintenance_required" INTEGER /* Whether the feature requires regular maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., storage room, guest room) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., common, private) */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Whether the amenity is considered premium */,
  "maintenance_required" INTEGER /* Whether the amenity requires regular maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agent_status" TEXT /* Current status of the agent (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the business */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the agent based on customer feedback */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., luxury, residential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_agent" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed by the agent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Market trend at the time of sale */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property for analytics */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city for better city-wise analytics */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for better category-wise analytics */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of properties in the same category and city */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the same category and city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
